modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Questions about evacuation and severe weather plans for Lee Medical Building

full_description_text:  
I’m trying to find out what the evacuation plan is for my building, the Lee Medical Building. Also, I need to know what to do if there’s severe weather. I just want to make sure I understand everything in case something happens. It’s really important to know how to stay safe!
short_description: Questions about evacuation and severe weather plans for Lee Medical Building
